cards.name: Spiky Energy
rulesText: As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides Colorless Energy.  If the Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), put 2 damage counters on the Attacking Pokémon.
